headline: Trump is selling high-speed access to his market-moving Truth Social posts
summary: Trump Media is launching "Truth API" for businesses. It offers faster access to "market-moving" posts on Truth Social. Aims to provide real-time data from influential accounts to Wall Street.

headline: The war on ‘woke science’ comes for space research
summary: A Trump administration proposal threatens US science funding. The OMB plan could give political appointees control over grants. Concerns are raised for the future of space research.

headline: God Of War TV series is recasting Kratos
summary: Amazon's God Of War series needs a new Kratos. Original actor Ryan Hurst is out due to an on-set injury. The recasting causes a major snag for the production.

headline: Fortnite is getting a bunch of AI-powered ‘personas’
summary: Fortnite will soon feature AI-powered characters. Epic Games allows creators to use AI voices starting July 30th. 36 pre-made characters with consistent voices will be available as NPCs.

headline: The Odyssey’s Scariest Scene Proves It’s Time for a Christopher Nolan Horror Movie
summary: The Odyssey contains a scene terrifying enough for a horror film. This highlights director Christopher Nolan's potential in the genre. Suggests Nolan should tackle a horror movie next.

headline: id Software Creative Director Says Claims the Doom Developer Was 'Nerfed Into the Ground' by Xbox Layoffs Are Untrue
summary: id Software's Hugo Martin refutes claims of severe impact from Xbox layoffs. The creative director insists the Doom developer remains strong. Comments address concerns about the studio's future.

headline: The Odyssey Estimated Box Office Opening Suggests a Strong Start Powered by Imax Hype
summary: "The Odyssey" is predicted for a strong opening weekend at the box office. Imax screenings are boosting initial sales estimates. The film is generating significant hype.

headline: GTA 6 Predicted to Make Up to $5.2 Billion in Sales by End of Launch Week After Securing an Estimated $260 Million via Preorders
summary: GTA 6 is projected to hit $5.2 billion in sales within its launch week. Preorders alone have amassed an estimated $260 million. Analysts note an unprecedented preorder campaign for the game.

headline: Five headaches Andy Burnham will have to deal with as PM
summary: Andy Burnham would face multiple challenges as UK Prime Minister. Key issues include defence spending and housing. The article outlines five specific difficulties for a new leader.

headline: Boy attacked by zoo crocodile has had seven operations and is smiling again, say parents
summary: A three-year-old boy attacked by a crocodile is recovering well. He has undergone seven operations in one month. Parents report the boy is now smiling and making good progress.

headline: The financial winners and losers from the World Cup
summary: The 2026 World Cup generates significant off-field revenue. Analysis reveals which entities profit most from the tournament. Identifies both financial beneficiaries and those losing out.

headline: China hits out at British Steel nationalisation
summary: China criticizes the UK government's nationalization of British Steel. The UK cites safeguarding "vital national capability" as the reason. The move brings the steel firm into public hands.
